text:
There was a little boy named Freddy.

One day, Freddy climbed a big oak tree. He liked to watch the world beneath him.

There was Mama Raven, swooping gracefully.

There was Papa Owl, wise and sleepy.

And there was Baby Wrens, singing sweet little songs.

Freddy felt silly jumping. But he had fun.

Then, the wind blew. Down came Freddy!

Luckily, Mama Raven caught him with her feathers.

"The Owls love their little friend!" she exclaimed.

Freddy laughed, hopping back onto branches.

And so he stayed, a little tree owl.

That's my story.
